title: Ensure ldap client is not installed

prose.en: Ensure ldap client is not installed

description.en: The Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) was introduced as a replacement for NIS/YP. It is a service that provides a method for looking up information from a central database.

rationale.en: If the system will not need to act as an LDAP client, it is recommended that the software be removed to reduce the potential attack surface.

audit.en:
Uninstall `ldap-utils`:  

Impact:  

Removing the LDAP client will prevent or inhibit using LDAP for authentication in your environment.

```
# apt purge ldap-utils
```

remediation.en:
Uninstall `ldap-utils`:  

Impact:  

Removing the LDAP client will prevent or inhibit using LDAP for authentication in your environment.

```
# apt purge ldap-utils
```
